verdict.note: Real headless Chromium, worktree dashboard (vite :5230 → worktree backend :8791) @ e210dfb, 4 genuinely live sessions on the board. #/issues: '5 live' ef-chip on the SECOND (chip) row beside '58 closed', same ef-chip look; toggle ON (.on styling) → 29 open rows narrow to EXACTLY 5 — the API-computed set of open issues whose originator (by) or a reply author is a live session id (expected 5, got 5); toggle OFF → 29 restored. #/evals: with zero live-filed readings the chip honestly self-hid (measured before filing); after this session (live, 1f08e26f…) filed 2 issues-view readings, the feed shows '2 live' on its chip row; toggle → exactly those 2 rows (filter-bar-shared-dropdown, panel-skeleton — the filer's own readings), release → 125. Same liveSession join as the originator dots (session.js). 0 page errors on both pages.

Dead-end reproduced on #/evals via real dashboard build over real /api/board+SSE: live chip ON -> live filer session leaves the board (worker closed after merge) -> liveCount=0 -> the chip (only control clearing liveOnly) unmounts -> liveOnly stuck true -> feed shows 'no current readings match' with NO recovery affordance, though 2 readings still exist.

Fixed: with the filter ON, the live chip stays mounted as liveCount->0 (reads '0 live', highlighted) instead of vanishing; clicking it releases liveOnly and the feed returns to its full 2 readings. No dead-end. Measured on the real fixed dashboard build over real /api/board+SSE reload.
"1 live" chip on both pages' 2nd chip row; narrows to exactly the live-session-behind set; toggles off to full list.
with filter ON, killing the live filer → chip stays mounted at "0 live" (still on), filter releasable, feed restores to full set.

Current-head isolated product fixture: genuine online session authored one disposable issue and filed one session reading; both pages PUSH ?live=1, Back restores All, and 390px kebabs stay at body/html 390.

Current-head isolated product fixture: after real session stop, both active Live views reached zero, retained the Live group, and All restored the offline author's/filer's row; fixture sessions and store were then closed and deleted.

both pages' Source session group: Present pick writes session:present (issues, visible text + one push), Missing writes session:missing and All releases back to the default text (evals); wording Present/Missing only — no live/online/offline; membership join is sessionPresent (unit-proven); group present in the 390 kebab. Row-vs-board membership diff not exhaustively compared — join is trivial membership.

16/16 real-Chromium (1440 evals+issues, 390 evals, video): session:present + a combined token → honest filtered zero; the query input stays focusable/editable at zero; deleting the tokens PUSHES back to the usable bare list; Back restores the exact zero state (URL+text+0 rows); overflow group stays mounted with Present checked and releasable; 390 flow unblocked, scrollWidth 390

16/16 post-fusion (1440 evals+issues, 390 evals, video): the engine keeps an ACTIVE fixed-enum value as a real checked row at zero data — Source session group mounted with Present checked and All releasable on BOTH pages; input stays editable at zero; token deletion pushes back to the usable list; Back restores the exact zero state; 390 unblocked
